business.name: DKB Lawn Care & Landscaping Service
business.tagline: Same-day service when your yard's out of control

hero.headline: *Same-day cuts* when the grass gets crazy
hero.subheadline: Columbus homeowners call us when the yard's embarrassing and needs fixing fast.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Overgrown to Outstanding
services_section.subheading: Every yard problem has a fix — and we bring the right tools

services.title: Emergency Lawn Rescue
services.description: When the grass is knee-high and the neighbors are complaining. Double and triple cuts to get you back to normal.

services.title: Mulch & Cleanup
services.description: Fresh mulch installation and full yard cleanup. Weeds pulled, beds cleared, property looking sharp.

services.title: Regular Lawn Care
services.description: Weekly or bi-weekly cuts to keep your yard consistently maintained. Never embarrassing again.

services.title: Weed Control & Edging
services.description: Flower bed weeding and crisp edge work. Clean lines that make the whole property pop.

about.heading: Show Up Fast, Get It Done Right
about.body: We're the Columbus lawn team that answers the phone and shows up same-day when your yard's out of control. Real curb appeal, competitive prices.

reviews.name: Logan J.
reviews.text: Most responsive company I called for mulching and cleanup. Owner came out same day, quoted same day, finished the next day!

reviews.name: Julia W.
reviews.text: Desperately needed my overgrown yards cut and they came out same day. Great, professional, courteous service!

reviews.name: P D.
reviews.text: Cut my overgrown lawn same day I called. Did double cuts on front, triple on back, plus weed whacking at no extra cost.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Columbus & Nearby Communities
service_areas.subheading: Same-day service across the metro area

cta.heading: Ready to Fix That Yard?
cta.body: Same-day quotes, competitive pricing, and the crew that shows up when they say they will. Get your Columbus property looking right.
